plans.title: Kanban Domain Contract
plans.description: Define board, card, scope, evidence, and history contracts.

tasks.title: T001 Define Kanban scope model for workspace specs and New Project draft/job scopes
tasks.description: Represent repository workspaces, specs, New Project drafts, and jobs as stable board scopes.

tasks.title: T002 Define deterministic board snapshot, column, card, and ordering schema
tasks.description: Create stable payloads for columns, cards, ordering, counts, and snapshot identity.

tasks.title: T003 Define evidence, source, confidence, and confirmed-versus-inferred semantics
tasks.description: Separate authoritative task state from observed activity and inferred run evidence.

tasks.title: T004 Define Curator update, latest pointer, history item, and retention schema
tasks.description: Define latest update and append-only history storage outside SDD artifacts.

tasks.title: T005 Define API response contracts for board snapshot, latest update, and history
tasks.description: Specify backend contracts used by the Workbench Kanban UI.

plans.title: Deterministic SDD Projection
plans.description: Compute board state from existing SDD artifacts without writing back to them.

tasks.title: T006 Implement SDD task parser integration for `tasks.md`, `tree.json`, metadata, and plan phases
tasks.description: Load task, phase, and status data from existing SDD files.

tasks.title: T007 Implement deterministic task-to-column mapping rules
tasks.description: Map planned, active, review, blocked, and done task evidence to fixed columns.

tasks.title: T008 Implement phase progress and ready/backlog ordering rules
tasks.description: Order cards predictably by phase, dependency, task number, and source identity.

tasks.title: T009 Implement board delta calculation between snapshots
tasks.description: Detect card moves, changed evidence, new cards, removed cards, and count changes.

tasks.title: T010 Persist projection/cache state outside SDD artifacts
tasks.description: Cache board snapshots and deltas without mutating spec files.

tasks.title: T011 Add API endpoint to fetch current Kanban board for a scope
tasks.description: Expose the deterministic board snapshot to Workbench clients.

tasks.title: T012 Add API endpoint or stream support for board refresh metadata
tasks.description: Expose snapshot version, updated time, and refresh hints.

plans.title: Passive Run Observer
plans.description: Collect read-only evidence from active runs, jobs, commands, tests, and generated repositories.

tasks.title: T013 Observe persisted Project Factory job and draft state as read-only evidence
tasks.description: Read current New Project progress without changing Project Factory behavior.

tasks.title: T014 Create run-step cards for active Generator, Reviewer, command, test, build, and release steps
tasks.description: Represent observed run activity separately from confirmed SDD task cards.

tasks.title: T015 Observe Codex/session transcript or JSONL sources when available without requiring full transcript downloads
tasks.description: Use bounded transcript windows or JSONL tails as optional evidence sources.

tasks.title: T016 Observe generated repository creation and map draft/job scope to workspace scope
tasks.description: Preserve continuity when New Project work moves into the created repository.

tasks.title: T017 Observe command, test, build, and release outcomes as blocker or validation evidence
tasks.description: Convert failures and passing checks into board evidence without assigning task completion.

tasks.title: T018 Parse Reviewer findings from existing artifacts or messages when safely detectable
tasks.description: Create review-finding cards when findings are explicit and sourceable.

tasks.title: T019 Implement change-triggered projection refresh with polling fallback
tasks.description: Refresh the board from filesystem/job events and periodic fallback polling.

plans.title: Curator Agent And History
plans.description: Generate friendly read-only updates and preserve a useful update timeline.

tasks.title: T020 Define Curator prompt and read-only input envelope
tasks.description: Limit Curator inputs to board snapshots, deltas, evidence, and previous update context.

tasks.title: T021 Implement Curator scheduler with debounce, interval, and active-scope gating
tasks.description: Run updates after meaningful changes and periodically while work is active.

tasks.title: T022 Implement Curator update generation with evidence hashing and no-op dedupe
tasks.description: Avoid duplicate history entries when observed state has not changed.

tasks.title: T023 Persist latest Curator update and append-only history outside SDD artifacts
tasks.description: Store latest and historical updates without touching spec files.

tasks.title: T024 Add history query and detail APIs
tasks.description: Expose reverse-chronological history and full update details to the UI.

plans.title: Workbench Kanban UI
plans.description: Render the Kanban board, latest update, and history in Workbench.

tasks.title: T025 Add Workbench Kanban primary tab and routing
tasks.description: Add a first-class Kanban route in the Workbench for active spec scopes.

tasks.title: T026 Render Kanban board columns, cards, badges, counts, and empty/loading/error states
tasks.description: Build the main board experience with stable card dimensions and clear states.

tasks.title: T027 Render latest Curator update panel in Kanban
tasks.description: Show the newest Curator summary beside or above the board depending on viewport.

tasks.title: T028 Add `View history` list and history detail view
tasks.description: Let users inspect prior Curator updates and their evidence.

tasks.title: T029 Add compact latest Curator update card to Workbench overview
tasks.description: Surface the newest update outside the Kanban tab.

tasks.title: T030 Add responsive mobile layout for Kanban and history
tasks.description: Ensure the board, update panel, and history are usable on phone screens.

plans.title: Validation And Rollout
plans.description: Validate the projection, observer, Curator, UI, and non-interference guarantees.

tasks.title: T031 Add backend tests for deterministic projection and task-state mapping
tasks.description: Cover stable snapshots, column mapping, ordering, and source artifact changes.

tasks.title: T032 Add backend tests for passive observer inputs, Curator dedupe, and history persistence
tasks.description: Cover observed evidence, no-op dedupe, latest pointer, and append-only history.

tasks.title: T033 Add Flutter tests for Kanban board, latest update, history, and responsive states
tasks.description: Cover the user-visible Workbench Kanban experience.

tasks.title: T034 Add New Project continuity regression tests and verify Generator/Reviewer behavior remains unchanged
tasks.description: Confirm draft/job-to-workspace continuity and no behavioral changes to Generator or Reviewer.
